name: model-predict
description: Batch inference against a registered platform ML model (RFC 0011). Names a model from the ml registry; the host signs a predict RPC to the controller, which resolves the model under the execution user's tenancy and serves the promoted version — local embeddings + in-Postgres ANN, no data egress (Tier-1-clean). Abstained/low-confidence slots come back null with their indices in abstained_idx, ready to route to an LLM fallback branch (the distillation pattern).

MODEL_NAME.description: Registered ml_models name to serve (e.g. 'inbox-classifier-personal'). Resolved under the execution user's tenancy — personal model first, then org models deterministically. The model must have a PROMOTED version (ml_promote_model).

INPUT_PATH.description: Dotted path to the item array in the node input (e.g. 'messages' or 'fetch.messages'). When omitted, the module probes 'inputs', 'items', 'messages', then a bare top-level array.

FEATURE_TEMPLATE.description: Per-item {{key}} / {{key.subkey}} template that builds the feature text the model sees — MUST match how the model's dataset examples were built (e.g. 'Subject: {{subject}}\nFrom: {{from}}\nSnippet: {{snippet}}' for the inbox classifier). Strings inline; other values JSON-serialize; unresolved placeholders stay visible. When omitted, string items pass through and objects JSON-serialize. Feature text is capped at 16KB per item.

CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD.description: Predictions below this confidence are treated as abstentions (null slot + abstained_idx entry). Calibrate from the model's eval coverage_curve — thresholds only transfer between identical voting schemes (see metrics_json.voting). Default 0 (no thresholding beyond the model's own abstention).

MAX_ITEMS.description: Cap on items processed per run (hard cap 512). Items beyond the cap are NOT silently dropped: they get null prediction slots, join abstained_idx (so the LLM-fallback branch still handles them), and are counted in the output's truncated field. Items are sent in batches of 32 per signed RPC; each item costs the controller one local embed + one ANN query, and a per-execution budget of 2000 inputs applies.
